justification: Primary building proximity setback used to screen suitable land and reduce likely conflict with residential receptors in the desk study
limitation: Desk-based proximity proxy only and not a substitute for planning review dwelling verification or detailed noise assessment
notes: building_buffer_500m.gpkg was created but not used for final parcel suitability screening

justification: Applied as a practical setback from mapped roads to avoid direct encroachment and maintain realistic separation for early-stage siting
limitation: Final access road interaction and crossing requirements would need detailed civil design review
notes: Final priority score based on distance to road and water bodies

justification: Applied to avoid direct encroachment on mapped water features and provide a basic environmental protection margin
limitation: Hydrological drainage and peatland interactions would need more detailed site-specific review
notes: Final priority score based on distance to road and water bodies

source_dataset: NPWS Special Areas of Conservation dataset
justification: Applied as an ecological exclusion layer based on mapped SAC boundaries and a confirmed 50 m project buffer
limitation: Mapped ecological exclusion used for desk-based screening; project-level ecological assessment
notes: potential relevance of noise shadow flicker disturbance and related litigation risk depending on protected-area sensitivities and receptor pathways

justification: Applied as an ecological exclusion layer based on mapped SPA boundaries and a confirmed 50 m project buffer
limitation: Mapped ecological exclusion used for desk-based screening; ornithological assessment
notes: potential relevance of noise shadow flicker disturbance and related litigation risk depending on protected-area sensitivities and receptor pathways

justification: Applied as a desk-based slope threshold to exclude steeper terrain from the final suitable land parcels
limitation: Slope alone does not capture peat depth ground bearing capacity access feasibility or full constructability risk which would require site-specific engineering assessment
notes: Represents slope geometry screening only and not full terrain or land-condition suitability
